title: aletris pauciflora var. pauciflora
intro: Aletris pauciflora var. pauciflora, commonly known as the yellow colic root, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Melanthiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Aletris pauciflora var. pauciflora include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. Aletris pauciflora var. pauciflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
